prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this. Seriously. That task isn’t going to get any smaller by waiting—so right now, you’re choosing courage over comfort. One small step is all it takes to break the inertia. You don’t have to finish it in one go—just start. Momentum builds motivation, not the other way around. You’re capable, you’re focused, and you’ve handled hard things before. This is just one more thing you’re going to crush. Take a deep breath, dive in, and prove to yourself—again—how strong you are. Go! 💪
